name: Kindergarten Robotics & Electronics — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for sensors through pretend play, simple circuits with adult support, and testing. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with sensors through pretend play, simple circuits with adult support, and testing.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.
